title: MCP Search Mode — Token & Cost Savings

panels.title: Avg prompt tokens — DEFAULT mode (avg across tool counts)
panels.description: Tool definitions sent to the model on the first call when ALL tools are advertised. Higher = more wasted context.

panels.title: Avg prompt tokens — SEARCH mode (avg across tool counts)
panels.description: Tool definitions sent when only get_tool + invoke_tool are advertised. Stays flat regardless of backend tool count.

panels.title: Prompt-token reduction (avg across tool counts)
panels.description: How much smaller the model's tool context is with search mode. Bigger is better.

panels.title: Prompt tokens vs tool count (the aha curve)
panels.description: Default rises as the backend exposes more tools; search stays flat. The gap is the saving.

panels.title: Avg USD cost per task by mode & tool count
panels.description: Real dollar cost per agent task at gpt-4o-mini list prices. Search bars are dramatically shorter.
